ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the stock exchange */,
  "closing_hours" TEXT /* Closing hours of the stock exchange */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the stock exchange (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., AAPL, GOOG) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the stock data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchange ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock data record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock this data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock data */,
  "open" TEXT /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" TEXT /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" TEXT /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" TEXT /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_close" TEXT /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "pre_market_open" TEXT /* Pre-market opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "post_market_close" TEXT /* Post-market closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "change_percent" TEXT /* Percentage change in the stock price on the given date */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" TEXT /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) of the stock on the given date */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the stock data record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the stock data record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock this indicator belongs to */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator (e.g., Moving Average, RSI) */,
  "indicator_value" TEXT /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the indicator is calculated */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period over which the indicator is calculated (e.g., 10 days, 50 days) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the technical indicator record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the technical indicator record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, investor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange the member belongs to */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Name of the member */,
  "member_type" TEXT /* Type of member (e.g., broker, trader) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the member */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_members_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchange ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "member_stock_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member stock data record */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member this data belongs to */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock this data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock data */,
  "open" TEXT /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" TEXT /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" TEXT /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" TEXT /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_close" TEXT /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "pre_market_open" TEXT /* Pre-market opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "post_market_close" TEXT /* Post-market closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "change_percent" TEXT /* Percentage change in the stock price on the given date */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" TEXT /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) of the stock on the given date */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the member stock data record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the member stock data record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_stock_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_stock_data_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES stock_exchange_members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the role */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
